case_title: ALETHENA LUCAS et al VS. KATHERINE ZAREMBA HAULENA et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HAULENA, KATHERINE ZAREMBA
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR AUG-13-2007. JUL-18-2007 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUCAS, ALETHENA TURNER, TAESIA AS TO DEFENDANT HAULENA, KATHERINE ZAREMBA DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-20-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-20-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-05-2007

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-30-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-20-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR MEREDITH, ROGER LOUIS
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUCAS, ALETHENA TURNER, TAESIA ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ARBITRATOR ROGER LOUIS MEREDITH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-13-2007 THROUGH NOV-11-2007.

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JAN-25-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES WAIVED DEC-18-2007 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT AND COMPLT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUCAS, ALETHENA TURNER, TAESIA SERVED MAY-04-2007, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE MAY-18-2007 AS TO DEFENDANT HAULENA, KATHERINE ZAREMBA
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-18-2007 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. THAT PLAINTIFF ALETHENA LUCAS RECOVER THE SUM OF $1800 AND THAT PLAINTIFF TAESIA TURNER RECOPVER THE SUM OF $500 FROM DEFENDANT KATHERINE ZAREMBA HAULENA. STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-25-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AFFIDAVIT OF REASONABLE DILIGENCE AS TO DEFT KATHERINE ZAREMBA HAULENA FILED BY PLTF

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-30-2007 CONTINUED TO JUL-18-2007 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). MAY-30-2007 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
